name: hk_1_13
requirements: As part of your analysis, over 2025-01-20 to 2025-01-26 compute and store: mean_aqhi_central (station 16), mean_aqhi_tuenmun (station 5), max_aqhi_central, max_aqhi_tuenmun (float) and higher_peak_station_id (16 or 5, higher max AQHI, int).

turns.query: Compare air quality trends between Central station (station_id: 16) and Tuen Mun station (station_id: 5) from January 20-26, 2025, analyzing AQHI variations and identifying peak pollution periods
